Method.doc:
Initialize the WindowCycle spoon

Parameters:
 * None

Returns:
 * The WindowCycle object
Method.name: init

Method.doc:
Start the WindowCycle spoon

Parameters:
 * None

Returns:
 * The WindowCycle object

Notes:
 * Begins monitoring for window cycling hotkeys
 * Automatically handles space switching when cycling across space boundaries
Method.name: start

Method.doc:
Stop the WindowCycle spoon

Parameters:
 * None

Returns:
 * The WindowCycle object

Notes:
 * Unbinds all hotkeys and stops window cycling
Method.name: stop

Method.doc:
Bind hotkeys for WindowCycle

Parameters:
 * mapping - A table with hotkey mappings:
   * prev - hotkey to cycle to previous window (e.g., {{"cmd", "alt"}, "left"})
   * next - hotkey to cycle to next window (e.g., {{"cmd", "alt"}, "right"})

Returns:
 * The WindowCycle object

Notes:
 * Windows are ordered left-to-right, top-to-bottom
 * Automatically switches spaces when cycling past the first/last window
 * Debouncing prevents accidental rapid cycling
Method.name: bindHotkeys
parameters: * mapping - A table with hotkey mappings

Method.doc:
Cycle to the next window

Parameters:
 * None

Returns:
 * The WindowCycle object

Notes:
 * Focuses the next window in left-to-right, top-to-bottom order
 * Automatically moves to the next space if at the last window on current space
Method.name: cycleNext

Method.doc:
Cycle to the previous window

Parameters:
 * None

Returns:
 * The WindowCycle object

Notes:
 * Focuses the previous window in left-to-right, top-to-bottom order
 * Automatically moves to the previous space if at the first window on current space
Method.name: cyclePrev

Variable.doc: Debounce delay in milliseconds to prevent rapid cycling (default: 70)
Variable.name: debounceMs

Variable.desc: Delay after space switch in seconds
Variable.doc: Delay after space switch in seconds before continuing to cycle (default: 0.1)
Variable.name: spaceHopDelay

Variable.doc: Logger instance for debugging. Set logger.level to "debug" for verbose output.
Variable.name: logger

doc:
Window/Space Cycler — Snappy & Production-Ready

This Spoon provides fast window cycling with automatic space switching when reaching
space boundaries. Windows are ordered left-to-right, top-to-bottom for intuitive navigation.

Download: [https://github.com/AndrewDryga/spoons/raw/main/WindowCycle.spoon.zip](https://github.com/AndrewDryga/spoons/raw/main/WindowCycle.spoon.zip)

Features:
 * Smart window ordering based on position (left-to-right, top-to-bottom)
 * Automatic space switching at boundaries
 * Debounced input to prevent accidental rapid switching
 * Window filtering to skip minimized and hidden windows
 * Seamless space wrapping for continuous navigation

Example configuration:
```lua
hs.loadSpoon("WindowCycle")

-- Customize timing (optional)
spoon.WindowCycle.debounceMs = 70        -- Debounce delay (milliseconds)
spoon.WindowCycle.spaceHopDelay = 0.1    -- Delay after space switch (seconds)

-- Bind hotkeys
spoon.WindowCycle:bindHotkeys({
    prev = {{"cmd", "alt"}, "left"},
    next = {{"cmd", "alt"}, "right"}
})

spoon.WindowCycle:start()
```

Alt-Tab Style Example:
```lua
-- Windows/Linux-style Alt-Tab
spoon.WindowCycle:bindHotkeys({
    next = {{"alt"}, "tab"},
    prev = {{"alt", "shift"}, "tab"}
})
```
